GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "A foolproof guide to shopping from David Jones this VOSN", "Shop smarter with Vogue's definitive guide to navigating the best offers from David Jones this VOSN.", "If there's anything Vogue knows well, it's how to shop. And, in these challenging and unprecedented times, it's more important than ever to shop smarter: curating your wardrobe, investing in timeless pieces and buying at the right time. This Vogue Online Shopping Night, premium department store David Jones is making that sentiment easier with a broad range of discounts available on your favourite designer brands. Here, our guide to navigating it with ease. Shop smarter with thoughtful investment pieces. With up to 20% off a great range of international designers at David Jones this VOSN, it may be the perfect time to shop for investment pieces to cherish this season and beyond. Quality pieces from international designer brands including Nanushka, Boyy, Balmain and Versace will quickly become wardrobe classics on high-rotation for years to come. Extend that same thinking to your interiors by shopping David Jones' extensive range of stylish homewares: for just two days, take an extra 10% off a great range of already reduced homewares and electricals. Replenish your work-from-home wardrobe. With office-dressing guidelines – blazers and tailoring – on pause for now for most of us, working from home opens up endless possibilities when it comes to our work-wardrobe. Think casual cool sweats in bold prints, exaggerated sleeves (perfect for video meetings), or a pair of statement earrings from designers including Reliqua, Aje, Amber Sceats, Acler and Lee Mathews (which are serving up 25% off on a great range of full-priced items). Likewise, if you had previously relegated your denim staples to your weekend wardrobe, make them part of your everyday look and shop up to 25% off a selection of timeless denim pieces from J Brand, Nobody Denim and AGolde. Take your workout to the next level. If you're like us, you've probably spent a good portion of the past fortnight sporting active-wear and breathable cotton basics. You may have also realised it's time to invest in a few new pieces to inspire you to whip out the yoga mat, pull on your running shoes or download a fitness app. This VOSN, you can expect to save up to 25% on a great range of full-priced pieces from athleisure brands like P.E. Nation, as well as the newly launched active-wear line C&M by Camilla and Marc. Happy shopping."
